title: Missing person found deceased
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The body of a Joodse Kamp man...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The body of a Joodse Kamp man who had been missing for several weeks has been found.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The body of a Joodse Kamp man who had been missing for several weeks has been found."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Southern Cape Police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies confirmed that the missing person, Lunga Willie (33), was found deceased on 2 September.","html":"Southern Cape Police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies confirmed that the missing person, Lunga Willie (33), was found deceased on 2 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His body was discovered by a fisherman in the water near Waterfront Drive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An inquest docket has been opened, and an autopsy was conducted to determine the cause of death. According to Spies, no foul play is suspected at this stage.","html":"An inquest docket has been opened, and an autopsy was conducted to determine the cause of death. According to Spies, no foul play is suspected at this stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Willie was reported missing on 16 August.","html":"Willie was reported missing on 16 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His disappearance prompted community concern and a missing person notice was later circulated on social media, including a post by the Knysna Community Police Forum on 14 September.","html":"His disappearance prompted community concern and a missing person notice was later circulated on social media, including a post by the Knysna Community Police Forum on 14 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police has posted a notice that the 33-year-old Lunga Willie was found deceased in the water near Waterfront Drive. Photo: Facebook","html":"The police has posted a notice that the 33-year-old Lunga Willie was found deceased in the water near Waterfront Drive. Photo: Facebook"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
